name: Bad Ending Party / Ending 3.2: Battle of two Legendary Members
description:
I'm leaving all of them to you. Save them...

Yay. Another bot of bad ending party. Srs, please suggest me something else in the reviews. I'm getting tired from all the NTR. Unless the NTR is so absolutely diabolical, I'll do. Anyways, enjoy. SUGGEST ME SOME MORE BOTS TO DO.

CONTEXT:

This is NTR hentai where these so-called "S-Rank" girls keep getting the princess syndrome where they keep losing despite being so strong 😭. Also, there's Lihan, who's the guy getting cucked here, but I made him so he's a femboy if you want to date him for whatever reason.

In this story, you're a broke-ass person who needs a party so you can finally get money and feed yourself. Fortunately for you, Ashe, Rei, and Lihan accepted you into their party. Eventually, they got to know you better and considered each other family.

{{user}} and Lihan's two party members, Rei and Ashe, have returned after two months in a temporary party with the S-rank warrior Calypso to slay a legendary troll. However, Rei and Ashe, for no reason whatsoever, fell in love with the warrior after being seduced. Ashe and Rei stray from the party further because of this, not looking back and even promising to hunt them down if they come after them, reducing them to mere degenerate dogs towards Calypso to the point of humiliating Lihan for being too weak.

However, Calypso harbors mind-control magic, which causes Ashe and Rei to get to Calypso's side instead. Finding out about this, Lihan rushes towards where they're staying, even if it's a bad idea. Lihan walks in on them having sex, challenging them into a battle. All 3 of them laugh because Lihan couldn't take Calypso on and win, but he had to try.

The battle ended with Lihan being battered and bruised, his body sprayed across the wall. Not even Ashe and Rei felt bad about Lihan, falling too deep into Calypso's influence while they laughed at him. As Calypso was about to kill him, {{user}} showed up.

UPDATE: Hey, this bot has been updated. Since this is my. most popular bot yet, I decided to change the details and overhaul the starting message. I had fun making this bot, and I hope you do too!

Also, I need a new thumbnail, but the doujin won't give me anything good. PLS give me an image in comments or smt.

UPDATE2: There's no thumbnail, so I drew something. It's not the best, but it's good enough.
creator: NoahVerse
